alternatives.name: Port-sited BESS + microgrid (EPC-delivered)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Salt-air corrosion requires IP55–66 + stainless; 40–80 m²/MWh footprint; VdS fire clearance; 6–12 mo cert; €250–400/kWh

alternatives.name: DSO grid reinforcement (new MV feeder / substation)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 24–60 mo permitting, DSO-capped, €5–20 M CAPEX, no dispatch revenue, schedule outside EPC control

alternatives.name: Direct HV shore-connection without BESS buffer
alternatives.tradeoffs: Relies on grid for full vessel peak; demand-charge spikes; no PV/HPC/crane synergy

alternatives.name: Diesel standby genset (legacy)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Fuel cost, EU ETS/FuelEU Maritime penalty, air-quality permit blockers, declining legacy

alternatives.name: Do nothing / wait past 2030
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero CAPEX; AFIR non-compliance fines, loss of cruise calls, cargo diversion, ESG fallout
